## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? `bun test` output, demo on device, manual reproduction, etc. For native changes, name the platform(s) verified (real iOS / real Android / web / simulator). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (or: no behavior change)
- [ ] README / JSDoc updated if a public API changed (or: no public surface change)
- [ ] `bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test` passes locally
- [ ] If touching native code: smoke-tested on at least one real device
